source: ledger + local Polymarket status-only commands + Paper Goblin Solana ledger + gate reports
privacy: Unlinked static dashboard; no private keys/secrets; public wallet addresses only; Solana rows are Paper Goblin paper-trading ledger entries.

crons.name: Polymarket generic position manager live small-bets

book.error: PolyApiException[status_code=404, error_message={'error': 'No orderbook exists for the requested token id'}]

tracked_wallets.label: Wallet 2
tracked_wallets.name: Arbitrum microcap pilot wallet
tracked_wallets.notes: Bot currently disarmed; used for tiny Arbitrum test swaps only.

past_trades.notes: First live deposit-wallet path test. TP matched; only unsellable dust remains.
Re-entry maker bid filled at 0.095, TP at 0.160 was canceled when spot stop fired; stop-sold 5 shares around 0.07. Net PNL uses observed deposit-wallet delta.
Live autonomous canary: exact approvals, auto exit, final WETH/USDC zero; ETH delta includes gas + pool roundtrip cost.
